heading: Cambewarra vs Cambewarra Village — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cambewarra, New South Wales and Cambewarra Village, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cambewarra Village has a lower overall climate risk score (44/100) compared to Cambewarra (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cambewarra or Cambewarra Village safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cambewarra has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Cambewarra Village scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cambewarra scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Cambewarra Village scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cambewarra or Cambewarra Village?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cambewarra Village has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.23% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
